channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Beer boxes and large nitrous oxide cannisters, 15th June
item.description:
Half way along gravel put lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Fawley Drive, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
3 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 600x400x40mm plus x7 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cirencester Road leading to Little Witcombe - pavement narrowed by weeds growing in detritus, 15th June
item.description:
Cirencester Road leading to Little Witcombe - pavement narrowed by weeds growing in detritus. Also lots of sand and grit at kerb edge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 600x400x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction caused by wall/building problem, 15th June
item.description:
Customer reports that they have attempted to access the PROW at the location, but the resident of Mill House has prevented them doing so; they report that the footpath has been sealed up (there is no signage). Ostensibly, it seems as though walkers are entering a private driveway. They ask that it is made clear that this a usable PROW which is accessible.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You can't make this stuff up!, 15th June
item.description:
This is a genuine photo taken on 11/06/2026. The car was not stopped at the junction, it was parked with no one inside right on the exit road from the medical centre! The only way this idiocy is going to stop is with double yellow lines, appropriate signage and enforcement!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
28day with 3 way traffic lights please cut overgrown brambles back to boundary approx 250m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM please place x2 footway closed signs on either side of overgrown hedges obstructing full width of footway. (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
